title: Automate M365 to Google Workspace Migrations with ADK multi-agents
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates building multi-agent systems using the Agent Development Kit (ADK) to automate Microsoft 365 to Google Workspace migrations. The approach uses sequential orchestration, self-correcting loops with LoopAgent, context caching, and priority inference to replace manual assessment processes with automated agent workflows deployed to Google's Agent Engine.
